sections.text: GregTech organizes all machines, cables, and components into voltage tiers. Each tier handles a specific voltage range. Machines must receive energy at their rated voltage. If a machine receives higher voltage than its tier, it will explode.

Tier	Name	Voltage (EU/t)
ULV	Ultra Low Voltage	8
LV	Low Voltage	32
MV	Medium Voltage	128
HV	High Voltage	512
EV	Extreme Voltage	2,048
IV	Insane Voltage	8,192
LuV	Ludicrous Voltage	32,768
ZPM	Zero Point Module	131,072
UV	Ultimate Voltage	524,288
